topics.meaning: Science is a systematic way of observing, questioning, testing, and explaining the world around us.

stepByStepExplanation.title: What is Science begins from observation
stepByStepExplanation.explanation: What is Science starts with something that can be observed in nature, the body, the kitchen, the sky, or ordinary surroundings.
